feed.title: Pronounce — recent dictionary additions
feed.subtitle: How engineers actually pronounce project / product / jargon names. Community-maintained.

entry.title: zhipu — jee poo
entry.summary: zhipu is pronounced "jee poo" (/ˈdʒiː puː/). Zhipu AI (智谱), maker of GLM/ChatGLM; pinyin "Zhì-pǔ", roughly "jee-poo".

entry.title: ernie — er nee
entry.summary: ernie is pronounced "er nee" (/ˈɜːrni/). Baidu's ERNIE LLM; "ER-nee", a play on BERT (Bert & Ernie).

entry.title: internlm — intern ell em
entry.summary: internlm is pronounced "intern ell em" (/ˌɪntɜːrn ɛl ˈɛm/). Shanghai AI Lab's open LLM; "intern-L-M".

entry.title: moonshot — moon shot
entry.summary: moonshot is pronounced "moon shot" (/ˈmuːnʃɒt/). Moonshot AI (月之暗面), maker of Kimi; "moon-shot".

entry.title: openhands — open hands
entry.summary: openhands is pronounced "open hands" (/ˈoʊpən hændz/). Open-source coding agent (formerly OpenDevin); "open-hands".

entry.title: opendevin — open dev in
entry.summary: opendevin is pronounced "open dev in" (/ˈoʊpən ˌdɛvɪn/). Former name of OpenHands; "open-DEV-in".

entry.title: goose — goose
entry.summary: goose is pronounced "goose" (/ɡuːs/). Block's open-source AI agent; like the bird.

entry.title: serde — sir dee
entry.summary: serde is pronounced "sir dee" (/sɜːrˈdiː/). Rust serialization framework; "sir-DEE" (serialize/deserialize), some say "SER-dee".

entry.title: yew — you
entry.summary: yew is pronounced "you" (/juː/). Rust/WASM front-end framework; "you", like the yew tree.

entry.title: clap — clap
entry.summary: clap is pronounced "clap" (/klæp/). Rust Command Line Argument Parser; "clap", like applause.

entry.title: rayon — ray on
entry.summary: rayon is pronounced "ray on" (/ˈreɪɒn/). Rust data-parallelism library; "RAY-on", like the fabric.

entry.title: wasmer — wahz mer
entry.summary: wasmer is pronounced "wahz mer" (/ˈwɑːzmər/). WebAssembly runtime; "WAHZ-mer" (wasm + -er).

entry.title: elysia — eh lih zee uh
entry.summary: elysia is pronounced "eh lih zee uh" (/ɛˈlɪziə/). Bun web framework; "eh-LIH-zee-uh".

entry.title: effect — ih fekt
entry.summary: effect is pronounced "ih fekt" (/ɪˈfɛkt/). Effect-TS library; just "effect".

entry.title: nitro — ny tro
entry.summary: nitro is pronounced "ny tro" (/ˈnaɪtroʊ/). UnJS server engine (powers Nuxt); "NY-tro".

entry.title: valibot — val ih bot
entry.summary: valibot is pronounced "val ih bot" (/ˈvælɪbɒt/). Schema validation library; "VAL-ih-bot".

entry.title: million — mill yun
entry.summary: million is pronounced "mill yun" (/ˈmɪljən/). Million.js — React optimizing compiler; "MIL-yun".

entry.title: rolldown — roll down
entry.summary: rolldown is pronounced "roll down" (/ˈroʊldaʊn/). Rust-based bundler (Vite's future core); "roll-down".

entry.title: convex — kon veks
entry.summary: convex is pronounced "kon veks" (/ˈkɒnvɛks/). Reactive backend platform; "KON-veks".

entry.title: xata — zah tah
entry.summary: xata is pronounced "zah tah" (/ˈzɑːtə/). Serverless database platform; "ZAH-tah".

entry.title: axiom — ak see um
entry.summary: axiom is pronounced "ak see um" (/ˈæksiəm/). Log/event analytics platform; "AK-see-um".

entry.title: quickwit — quick wit
entry.summary: quickwit is pronounced "quick wit" (/ˈkwɪkwɪt/). Search engine for logs; "quick-wit".

entry.title: reflex — ree fleks
entry.summary: reflex is pronounced "ree fleks" (/ˈriːflɛks/). Python full-stack framework (formerly Pynecone); "REE-fleks".

entry.title: zstd — zee standard
entry.summary: zstd is pronounced "zee standard" (/ˌziː ˈstændərd/). Zstandard compression; "Z-standard" or spelled "Z-S-T-D".

entry.title: warp — warp
entry.summary: warp is pronounced "warp" (/wɔːrp/). Rust-based terminal (and a Rust web framework); "warp".
